backlog.title: Resolve TypeScript errors in app.module.ts
backlog.goal: Fix TypeScript compilation errors related to missing module declarations.
backlog.why: These errors prevent the application from compiling and running correctly, which impacts all subsequent development work.

backlog.title: Add monitoring for application performance
backlog.goal: Implement basic monitoring to track key performance indicators.
backlog.why: Monitoring is essential for understanding and improving the application's efficiency and reliability.

backlog.title: Add unit tests for monitoring utility
backlog.goal: Ensure that the monitoring utilities work as expected.
backlog.why: Unit tests are crucial for maintaining code quality and preventing regressions.
backlog.commit_message: test(utility): add unit tests for monitoring

accepted.title: Improve Developer Experience Around Changed Modules
accepted.commit_message: Refactor validation service to use class-validator for input validation and improve testing

accepted.title: Add unit tests for the new input validation functions
accepted.goal: Ensure that all newly added input validation functions are working as expected.
accepted.commit_message: test: add unit tests for new input validation functions
accepted.implementation_summary: Installed type definitions for Jest and TypeScript errors fixed
